methodsAttempted.query: site:kfupm.edu.sa KFUPM "generative AI" policy OR guidelines OR ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Returned official research project, official event, and research-profile pages; research and event pages were rejected for policy specificity.
Returned Research & Innovation policies index, official course material, news, and public study pages; no broad AI-use policy surfaced.
Returned official ChatGPT Edu news, training/event pages, and AI+X; non-news AI+X page was selected for narrow claims.
Returned official event and course PDF results; these were rejected as event-only or course-specific.
Arabic-language query surfaced the English AI+X page as the only relevant official non-news result.
Firecrawl map/search over the main domain did not reveal additional policy-specific AI guidance beyond low-specificity academic and research pages.

summary: Discovery found one official non-news KFUPM source suitable for narrow AI education and ChatGPT Edu claims. News-only, event-only, research showcase, course-specific PDF, and non-AI policy-index results were rejected rather than used for university-wide policy claims.
